purpose: Monitoring companion app for DENG Tool: Rejoin
changelog: Connection status is now computed from a 30-second last_seen_at TTL on the backend — the APK shows 'Disconnected' within ~30 seconds of the cloud phone rebooting or stopping `deng-rejoin`, instead of being stuck on 'Connected' forever.

Settings selection now updates instantly: optimistic local state is applied the moment a radio is tapped, and the status poller is kicked immediately after a successful save so you no longer have to leave and re-enter the Settings screen to see the saved value.

Snapshot tab no longer says 'Waiting for first snapshot…' forever — the Termux bridge now reports real capture/upload diagnostics (capture_failed, screencap_unavailable, upload_failed, byte counts) and the APK surfaces them as actionable status lines.

Snapshot capture is now whole-display: the Termux client tries `screencap -p`, then `/system/bin/screencap -p`, then (opt-in) `su -c "screencap -p"`, validates the PNG magic bytes, and never falls back to an app-only capture.

Package state model rewritten — the APK now shows exactly 5 states: Dead, Launching, Joining, Online, No Heartbeat. The old 'In-Lobby' state has been removed (lobby maps to Dead so the watchdog re-issues a relaunch/rejoin).
Launching vs Joining are now distinct: Launching = opening the Roblox package, Joining = opening the configured private-server URL.
Stable v1.0.0 Termux package was rebuilt with the new state vocabulary and whole-screen snapshot path; /install/v1.0.0 and /install/latest both serve the fixed artifact.
Backend /api/monitor/devices/:id/status now returns connected, connection_state, seconds_since_last_seen, and last_bridge_status alongside the existing last_snapshot_captured_at field.
Dashboard adds dedicated Launching and Joining tiles; the 'Connected/Disconnected' badge has been split into its own ConnectionBadge so it doesn't conflict with the package state vocabulary.
